name: Gate 1 - North Entrance
description: Main northern entrance near public transport transit hubs.

name: Gate 2 - East Entrance
description: Eastern access gate adjacent to Premium Parking Lot B.

name: Gate 3 - South Gate
description: Southern exit and entry gate, close to shuttle stations.

name: Gate 4 - West Gate (Accessible Primary)
description: Primary accessible gate with zero-step entry and dedicated assistance desks.

name: Zone A - North Stand Upper
description: Upper deck north stand seating, accessed via Escalators 3 & 4.

name: Zone B - East Stand Concourse
description: East concourse seating and concession row including major dining outlets.

name: Zone C - South stand Club Level
description: South premium stand seating with direct accessibility ramp access.

name: Zone D - West Stand Lower
description: Lower deck seating near team benches, close to accessible seating deck.
